name: CF Industries Holdings, Inc.
summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. is a manufacturer and distributor of nitrogen-based fertilizers and other nitrogen products. The company operates through subsidiaries across the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Trinidad and Tobago, Peru, and Barbados. Its operations include production and sale of nitrogen fertilizers, with strategic ventures including CF Industries Nitrogen, LLC, in which CF holds an 88.6% membership interest.
